title: Codiva.dev | Custom software and digital products
description: Custom software in Mexico: SaaS platforms, vertical operating systems, e-commerce, and corporate sites. Every project is shaped around how your business runs, from idea to production.

validation.tooShort: Too short. Please provide more detail.

status.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: From idea to production with a clear rhythm and direct communication with the people writing the code.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We learn your operations, users, and constraints. We define scope, priorities, and initial architecture.

steps.title: Design & build
steps.description: We design flows and ship in short iterations: frontend, backend, integrations, and admin panels.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: We deploy carefully: payments, roles, sensitive data, and baseline monitoring ready to operate.

steps.title: Evolution
steps.description: Ongoing support, fixes, and new capabilities on top of what is already live.

about.title: Custom software that runs real businesses
about.paragraph1Intro: At Codiva.dev we build custom software, not templates or generic packages, and ship it to production:
about.paragraph1Outro: with payments, user roles, admin panels, and ongoing support.
about.paragraph2Intro: Every project starts from how your business operates: we design sustainable architecture, integrate
integrationTypes: WhatsApp Business, email, and real-time alerts
Vercel, edge computing, and global deployments
webhooks, queues, ETL, and data pipelines
open banking, ACH/wires, and financial reconciliation
MLS portals, maps, and real-estate scheduling
about.paragraph2Outro: and deliver at a clear pace. Whether it's your first launch or evolving what's already live, Codiva.dev works with you through direct communication with the people writing the code.

list.title: Web Essentials
list.description: Corporate sites, landing pages, and responsive digital presence for industrial brands, real estate, and professional services.

list.title: Apps & Systems
list.description: Custom software for real operations: SaaS platforms, vertical ERPs, marketplaces, and tailored backend systems for startups and companies.
details: Integration with Stripe, maps, and external services

list.title: Continuous improvement & support
list.description: Fixes, enhancements, and new capabilities on live platforms: bookings, payments, CRM, inventory, and more.
details: Backlog prioritization and monthly or sprint-based delivery
Small features and integrations (APIs, payments, maps, etc.)
Direct communication with the people doing the work
extras: Extra capacity for launches or migrations

cases.title: Success stories
cases.description: Over a dozen products in production: LegalTech, hospitality, construction, retail, and corporate sites. These are some of the brands we work with and the technologies we use to ship them.

list.name: Inquilia
list.description: LegalTech rental platform for Mexico: legal screening, digital contracts, full CRM, and Stripe billing.

list.name: CD648
list.description: Boutique hotel booking system. Real-time availability, Stripe payments, location map, and installable PWA.

list.name: Quimialcla
list.description: Bilingual corporate site for a water treatment company. Product catalog, WWTP sectors, and direct contact.

list.name: Morningstar
list.description: Wellness e-commerce with spiritual paths, Stripe checkout, admin panel, and bilingual ES/EN experience.

list.name: AMIDA
list.description: Corporate site for an architecture and engineering firm. Project gallery, services, and bilingual contact.

list.name: Suitable
list.description: Hospitality operations SaaS: reservations, cleaning, maintenance, inventory, and access control.

list.name: YOU. Soluciones Inmobiliarias
list.description: Real estate portal with EasyBroker catalog, maps, visit scheduling, inline CMS, and automated reminders.

quote.thankYou: Thank you for contacting us. We will get back to you soon.
quote.promptTitle: How do you want to proceed?
quote.promptSubtitle: Choose the option that works best for you.

ticket.title: Report a ticket
ticket.subtitle: Include steps, URLs, and attach screenshots if relevant.

hints.attachments: Images and documents accepted. Max ~10MB per file.
hints.textarea: What you expected, what happened, steps to reproduce, screenshots/URLs…
